WEDDING CELEBRATION

You Are Cordially Invited

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

|

hero.designNotes: Royal Durbar Palace aesthetic rendered in deep obsidian black (#0E0A04) with 24-karat gold (#C9A84C) as the sole accent — conjuring the grandeur of a Gujarati royal wedding at a palace venue. The layout is vertically centred with a full-viewport immersive feel. A dark radial gradient base with warm amber undertones mimics candlelit palace walls. Mughal-arch SVG silhouettes flank the sides at low opacity, reinforcing the palace motif without competing with text. Four animated marigold glyphs float at the corners with a slow breathe-and-fade keyframe, nodding to the Gujarati tradition without being illustrative. A circular crest badge with a decorative symbol anchors the hierarchy, followed by a letterspaced eyebrow, monumental Cormorant Garamond name display in a gold gradient with italic bride / roman groom contrast, a pulsing ampersand medallion, the hero message in warm cream, a glassmorphic details strip, and a bordered gold CTA button. All elements animate in via staggered hero001FadeUp keyframes. Fully responsive across 900px and 640px breakpoints with graceful stack reflow on mobile.
